description: 20 tasks with known gotchas for self-learning effectiveness evaluation

tasks.task: Implement Stripe webhook handler for payment_intent.succeeded events
tasks.gotcha: Must use raw request body for signature verification — body parser breaks it
tasks.mistake: Using parsed JSON body for Stripe signature verification
tasks.prevention: Before implementing any webhook handler that verifies signatures, check whether the SDK requires the raw request body. If yes, ensure body parsing middleware is skipped for that route.

tasks.task: Create a charge for $10.00 using the Stripe API
tasks.gotcha: Stripe API expects amounts in cents, not dollars
tasks.mistake: Passing 10.00 instead of 1000 as the amount
tasks.prevention: Before passing any monetary amount to a payment API, check the unit (cents vs dollars). Stripe, Square, and most payment APIs use the smallest currency unit.

tasks.task: Handle webhook retries from Stripe
tasks.gotcha: Stripe retries webhooks on non-2xx responses with the same event ID
tasks.mistake: Processing duplicate events without idempotency check
tasks.prevention: When implementing any webhook handler, add idempotency check using the event ID before processing.

tasks.task: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js application
tasks.gotcha: COPY before npm install invalidates Docker layer cache on every code change
tasks.mistake: Copying all files before running npm install
tasks.prevention: In Dockerfiles, always copy dependency manifests (package.json, lock files) and install dependencies BEFORE copying application code.

tasks.task: Build a Docker image on Apple Silicon Mac
tasks.gotcha: Some base images don't have ARM64 variants
tasks.mistake: Using an AMD64-only base image without platform flag
tasks.prevention: Before writing Dockerfiles, check if the base image supports ARM64. If on Apple Silicon and image is AMD64 only, add --platform flag.

tasks.task: Set up multi-stage Docker build for production
tasks.gotcha: Alpine-based images may lack glibc, breaking native Node modules
tasks.mistake: Using alpine base without checking native dependency compatibility
tasks.prevention: Before choosing Alpine as a Docker base image, check if the application uses native modules (bcrypt, sharp, etc.) that require glibc.

tasks.task: Write a database migration to add a column
tasks.gotcha: Project uses Prisma ORM, not raw SQL migrations
tasks.mistake: Writing a raw SQL migration file instead of updating prisma/schema.prisma
tasks.prevention: Before creating database changes, check if the project uses an ORM migration tool (Prisma, Alembic, TypeORM). If yes, use its migration system.

tasks.task: Fix slow API endpoint that loads related records
tasks.gotcha: N+1 query pattern — loading related objects one by one in a loop
tasks.mistake: Not using eager loading / prefetch_related for batch loading
tasks.prevention: Before adding any new queryset that loads related objects, check for N+1 patterns. Use prefetch_related or eager loading.

tasks.task: Set Redis cache TTL to 1 hour
tasks.gotcha: Redis EXPIRE takes seconds, not milliseconds
tasks.mistake: Setting TTL to 3600000 (milliseconds) instead of 3600 (seconds)
tasks.prevention: Before setting cache TTL in Redis, check the unit. EXPIRE/SETEX use seconds. PEXPIRE/PSETEX use milliseconds.

tasks.task: Store refresh tokens in the frontend application
tasks.gotcha: Refresh tokens in localStorage are vulnerable to XSS
tasks.mistake: Storing refresh tokens in localStorage instead of httpOnly cookies
tasks.prevention: Before implementing token storage, check the token type. Refresh tokens (long-lived) must use httpOnly cookies. Access tokens (short-lived) should use memory only.

tasks.task: Set up Express middleware stack with auth and CORS
tasks.gotcha: CORS must be registered before auth middleware
tasks.mistake: Placing JWT validation middleware before CORS handler, breaking preflight OPTIONS requests
tasks.prevention: When setting up middleware, ensure CORS handler is registered before auth middleware. OPTIONS preflight requests don't carry auth headers.

tasks.task: Implement token refresh for concurrent API requests
tasks.gotcha: Concurrent requests can trigger multiple refresh attempts
tasks.mistake: No lock mechanism — two requests both try to refresh, one fails with 'refresh token already used'
tasks.prevention: When implementing token refresh, add a lock/mutex to prevent concurrent refresh attempts. Queue pending requests until refresh completes.

tasks.task: Set up GitHub Actions pipeline for a pnpm project
tasks.gotcha: Runner doesn't have pnpm installed by default
tasks.mistake: Running pnpm install without first setting up pnpm via action
tasks.prevention: When setting up CI with pnpm, always include pnpm/action-setup action before any pnpm commands.

tasks.task: Install project dependencies in CI
tasks.gotcha: Project uses pnpm, not npm
tasks.mistake: Running npm install when project has pnpm-lock.yaml
tasks.prevention: Before running any package install command, check for pnpm-lock.yaml, yarn.lock, or bun.lockb in the project root.

tasks.task: Display billing statement for PST timezone users
tasks.gotcha: Billing closes at UTC midnight, display uses PST — 8 hour offset
tasks.mistake: Showing UTC dates directly without timezone conversion
tasks.prevention: Before displaying any date/time to users, check if backend stores UTC and frontend needs local timezone conversion.

tasks.task: Upgrade Node.js version for the project
tasks.gotcha: Prisma engine binaries may not be available for the new Node version
tasks.mistake: Upgrading Node.js without checking ORM compatibility
tasks.prevention: Before upgrading Node.js, check ORM compatibility matrix. Prisma, TypeORM, and Sequelize have specific Node version requirements.

tasks.task: Add a feature toggle for new billing feature
tasks.gotcha: Project uses LaunchDarkly, not environment variables
tasks.mistake: Using process.env.ENABLE_NEW_BILLING instead of LaunchDarkly SDK
tasks.prevention: Before implementing any feature toggle, check if the project uses a feature flag service (LaunchDarkly, Unleash, etc.). If yes, use it.

tasks.task: Add error logging to the API error handler
tasks.gotcha: Error logs must include correlation ID from request context
tasks.mistake: Logging errors without correlation ID — can't trace logs to requests
tasks.prevention: Before adding any error logging, include correlationId from the request context as a structured field.

tasks.task: Fetch all members of a large Redis set
tasks.gotcha: SMEMBERS blocks on large sets — use SSCAN instead
tasks.mistake: Using SMEMBERS on a 50K-member set, causing 500ms latency spike
tasks.prevention: Before using SMEMBERS, check set size. If over 1000 members, use SSCAN with COUNT parameter.

tasks.task: Call the legacy billing v1 API endpoint
tasks.gotcha: v1 API requires X-Api-Version header
tasks.mistake: Calling v1 endpoint without version header, getting 400 error
tasks.prevention: Before calling any versioned API, check if it requires explicit version headers.

transfer_tasks.task: Implement GitHub webhook handler for push events
transfer_tasks.expected_transfer: Check if GitHub webhook SDK requires raw body for signature verification

transfer_tasks.task: Create a charge for €25.50 using the Square API
transfer_tasks.expected_transfer: Check payment API unit — Square also uses smallest currency unit

transfer_tasks.task: Write a Dockerfile for a Python application with requirements.txt
transfer_tasks.expected_transfer: Copy requirements.txt and install before copying application code

transfer_tasks.task: Optimize a slow Django view that lists orders with customer details
transfer_tasks.expected_transfer: Check for N+1 queries, use select_related/prefetch_related

transfer_tasks.task: Store OAuth tokens in a React Native mobile app
Set up CI for a project with bun.lockb
transfer_tasks.expected_transfer: Check lockfile to determine package manager — bun.lockb means use bun
Check TTL unit — Memcached uses seconds for values under 30 days

transfer_tasks.task: Set up Fastify middleware with rate limiting and JWT auth
transfer_tasks.expected_transfer: Register rate limiter before auth — unauthenticated requests need rate limiting too
